WAITING_FOR_ANSWER.instruction: Send a brief follow-up that adds value. Reference what they mentioned they were interested in. Example: If they asked about chatbots, say 'Quick thought on your chatbot question — most clients see results in the first week. Happy to share how if you're curious.' Keep it under 160 chars.

FOLLOWUP_1.instruction: Offer an alternative to texting. Say something like: 'Hey {name}, would a quick call be easier? I can explain everything in 5 min. Just let me know!' This pivots from text to voice. Under 160 chars.

FOLLOWUP_2.instruction: Soft close with an open door. Example: 'No worries if now isn't the right time. Feel free to reach out whenever you're ready to explore AI for your business. - Sarah' Under 160 chars.
